Welcome to my homepage!

Baiting Xie

Workstation: Shuangqing Complex Building C740 S105
Email: xbt23"at"mails.tsinghua.edu.cn

I'm a PHD student in Qiuzhen college of Tsinghua University from Sept 2023, under the supervision of Chenglong Yu. My research interest is in complex algebraic geometry. Recently I focus on hyperplane arrangements.

Papers

  1. The {N/D}-Conjecture for Nonresonant Hyperplane Arrangements. (with Chenglong Yu)
  2. Homology of Local Systems on Real Line Arrangement Complements. (with Chenglong Yu)

Seminars

  • 2026 Spring Learning Seminar

Talks

  1. The {N/D}-Conjecture for Nonresonant Hyperplane Arrangements.

TA

  • Algebra 2 Spring 2024-2025
  • Commutative Algebra and Homological Algebra Spring 2023-2024
  • Algebra 1 Fall 2023-2024
  • Complex Analysis Spring 2022-2023
Baiting's Homepage is maintained by Baiting Xie. This page was generated by GitHub Pages.
